modules.module_title: NATP Module 4: Prevention and Management of Catastrophes and Unusual Occurrences
modules.short_title: Prevention and Management of Catastrophes and Unusual Occurrences
modules.source_status_flag: Generated from approved Module 4 PDF source map.
learning_objectives: Explain the role of the Nurse Assistant in emergency, disaster, and fire situations
Describe ways the Nurse Assistant can help patients/residents, families, and visitors remain calm in an emergency situation
Describe common emergency codes used in facilities
Describe general rules for providing a safe environment for the Nurse Assistant
Describe general rules for providing a safe environment for the patient/resident
Identify two safety issues for the patients/residents and interventions to prevent them
Describe major causes of fire and general fire prevention rules
List the safety rules to be followed for the patient/resident receiving oxygen therapy
Describe the safe application of postural supports and the implication for their use
Discuss the legal and psychological implication of the use of postural supports

cards.learning_goal: Define key terminology
cards.learner_facing_content: Source-traced focus: Define key terminology. Review the approved source outline, use de-identified examples only, and apply report/observe/defer boundaries. Source excerpt support: Assignments Define key terminology. A. Review the terms listed in the terminology section A. Lecture/Discussion A. Ask students to select B. Spell the listed terms accurately B. Games: word searches, five words from the list C. Pronounce the terms correctly of key terminology and D. Use the terms in their proper context crossword puzzles, write a sentence for Family Feud, Jeopardy, each defining the term
